# Isai Flow (isaiflow.in)

Isai Flow is a premium, minimal Tamil internet radio player. It aggregates handpicked live Tamil FM stations and streams from around the globe into a single, high-performance web interface.

## Core Features
- **High-Quality Streams:** Direct access to live Tamil FM channels.
- **Minimalist Design:** Focus on the music with zero distractions.
- **Modern Tech:** Built with Next.js 16 and React 19 for speed and responsiveness.
- **Global Availability:** Accessible anywhere with an internet connection.

## Development Context
- **Repository:** https://github.com/gurubaladhinesh/isai-flow
- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **API:** Integrates with Radio Browser API for station discovery.

## Useful Links
- [Sitemap](https://isaiflow.in/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://isaiflow.in/robots.txt)
- [Source Code](https://github.com/gurubaladhinesh/isai-flow)
